ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic dataset */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species the dataset belongs to */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was collected */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path for the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "sequencing_method" TEXT /* Method used for sequencing (e.g., Illumina, PacBio) */,
  "sequencing_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sequencing data */,
  "sequencing_center" TEXT /* Name of the sequencing center */,
  "collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the dataset was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collection (e.g., field collection, lab collection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_datasets_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, least concern) */,
  "genome_size" TEXT /* Size of the genome in base pairs */,
  "chromosome_count" INTEGER /* Number of chromosomes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_version" TEXT /* Version of the tool or software */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_parameters_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_parameters_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likelihood_ratios" (
  "lrt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each likelihood ratio test */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the test */,
  "dN" REAL /* dN value from the analysis */,
  "dS" REAL /* dS value from the analysis */,
  "dN_dS_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of dN/dS */,
  "lrt_value" REAL /* Likelihood ratio test value */,
  "p_value" REAL /* p-value from the likelihood ratio test */,
  "log_likelihood" REAL /* Log of the likelihood value */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the likelihood ratio test */,
  "analysis_version" TEXT /* Version of the tool or software */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the likelihood ratio test was performed */,
  "analysis_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lrt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likelihood_ratios_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likelihood_ratios_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "metric_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used to compute the metric */,
  "metric_version" TEXT /* Version of the tool or software */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was computed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations from the experiment */,
  "experiment_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the experiment */,
  "experiment_version" TEXT /* Version of the tool or software */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, failed) */,
  "experiment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the experiment in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is assigned to */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource that the permission applies to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., read, write) */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., dataset, analysis, visualization) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the action request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path for the visualization output */,
  "visualization_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used to create the visualization */,
  "visualization_version" TEXT /* Version of the tool or software */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata pertains to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata entry */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., manual entry, automated process) */,
  "metadata_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_queue" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the task is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  "task_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the task */,
  "task_version" TEXT /* Version of the tool or software */,
  "task_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the task in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_queue_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_queue_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
